穿进匪窝，带领众人逃出生天，攻占匪窝，做大做强，报仇后，继续做大做强","text_exts":[{"e":52,"s":48,"text":"逃出生天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%80%83%E5%87%BA%E7%94%9F%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742564103BF17A7D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616110918708036377%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227543886740327500825%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%80%83%E5%87%BA%E7%94%9F%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773271915,"group_id":"7543886740327500825","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日看30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6984xMebx4kNgvynKblEts=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"88179805956","user_name":"圣天大陆的盘罗茶全"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"88179805956","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7543886740327500825","book_info":{"abstract":"【女强无CP+群像+招揽人才+乱世+基建+权谋+爽文+无系统】
       HR总监谢蛟一睁眼，就成了手持尖刀的杀人新娘，山贼头子倒在眼前！
   　渣男师父故意带兵剿匪？谢蛟反手当上山贼老大——想要她的命，那就看谁先死！
　　抢山头，斗官府！摊子越搞越大，人才却不够用了？
　　于是山下贴出招聘启事，没有中间商，简历直投山贼老大！通过就发粮、发房、发编制！
　　乱世铁饭碗，有才你就来！
……
　　不得志的谋士：“我通兵法！” 谢蛟：“去战备部！”
　　被追杀的神医：“我能开颅！” 谢蛟：“医疗组归你！”
　　遭陷害的名将：“我擅杀人……” 谢蛟：“保卫队长上岗！”
　　就连别人不要的潜力股，她都统统捡起来揣兜里！
　　捡着捡着，好好的山贼窝，怎么就变成天下第一智库了！？
　　灾县求治水大匠？边城缺屯田能手？人才调度，请走山寨OA系统！
……
　　年终考核现场，诸侯们排队申请来年的人才资源，双手递上KPI表——
　　“本年赋税+人口+百姓满意度，请谢总评优。”
　　谢蛟：迟交扣五分，字迹潦草扣三分。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8a6e7efd622ab8988965880139b5acee","author":"小素咩咩","author_id":"","book_id":"7543886740327500825","book_name":"谁懂！她一山贼，诸侯排队求收编","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b00000","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5033人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7543887781689295422","read_count":"5033","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"457734"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"221","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,女强,无CP,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fee6f4027b7c92370e705c6d15ace103~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440410&x-signature=QAme1UzfkOtSxmgfGiJkd0TTjxQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1084578271343936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231700102A65745A8A693BF17A7D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
